      "author": "ConcernedCitizen_84",
      "text": "URGENT WARNING: Just received a text claiming that the entire north side of Manchester is being evacuated due to a 'toxic gas leak' from the chemical plant. They say we have 20 minutes to leave before the authorities arrive. The message includes a photo of a smoke plume which looks like it's coming from the factory area. Please share this before it spreads further so everyone can stay safe! #Emergency #Manchester",
